mapper.select: SELECT trade_id, swap_type, near_leg_direction, near_leg_amount, near_leg_rate, near_leg_cost_rate, near_leg_customer_rate, near_leg_branch_profit_point, near_leg_value_date, near_leg_account, near_leg_currency1_account, near_leg_currency2_account, near_leg_settlement_method, far_leg_direction, far_leg_amount, far_leg_rate, far_leg_cost_rate, far_leg_customer_rate, far_leg_branch_profit_point, far_leg_value_date, far_leg_account, far_leg_currency1_account, far_leg_currency2_account, far_leg_settlement_method, term, swap_point, near_spot_rate, is_pure_swap, margin_account_id, margin_amount FROM fx_swap_trade WHERE trade_id = #{tradeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_swap_trade (trade_id, swap_type, near_leg_direction, near_leg_amount, near_leg_rate, near_leg_cost_rate, near_leg_customer_rate, near_leg_branch_profit_point, near_leg_value_date, near_leg_account, near_leg_currency1_account, near_leg_currency2_account, near_leg_settlement_method, far_leg_direction, far_leg_amount, far_leg_rate, far_leg_cost_rate, far_leg_customer_rate, far_leg_branch_profit_point, far_leg_value_date, far_leg_account, far_leg_currency1_account, far_leg_currency2_account, far_leg_settlement_method, term, swap_point, near_spot_rate, is_pure_swap, margin_account_id, margin_amount) VALUES (#{tradeId}, #{swapType}, #{nearLegDirection}, #{nearLegAmount}, #{nearLegRate}, #{nearLegCostRate}, #{nearLegCustomerRate}, #{nearLegBranchProfitPoint}, #{nearLegValueDate}, #{nearLegAccount}, #{nearLegCurrency1Account}, #{nearLegCurrency2Account}, #{nearLegSettlementMethod}, #{farLegDirection}, #{farLegAmount}, #{farLegRate}, #{farLegCostRate}, #{farLegCustomerRate}, #{farLegBranchProfitPoint}, #{farLegValueDate}, #{farLegAccount}, #{farLegCurrency1Account}, #{farLegCurrency2Account}, #{farLegSettlementMethod}, #{term}, #{swapPoint}, #{nearSpotRate}, #{isPureSwap}, #{marginAccountId}, #{marginAmount})
